name: Bitly
description: Bitly URL shortening and link management platform. Shorten URLs, retrieve link details, manage bitlinks, and access click analytics.

tools.name: shorten_url
tools.description: Shorten a long URL into a Bitly short link. Optionally specify a custom domain (defaults to bit.ly) and a group GUID.

domain.description: Custom short domain to use (e.g. 'bit.ly', 'j.mp', or your custom branded domain). Defaults to 'bit.ly'.

group_guid.description: GUID of the group to associate the short link with. Optional.

tools.name: get_bitlink
tools.description: Retrieve details about a specific Bitlink including its long URL, creation date, tags, and custom bitlinks. The bitlink parameter should be the short URL without the protocol (e.g. 'bit.ly/abc123').

bitlink.description: The Bitlink to retrieve, without the protocol. Example: 'bit.ly/abc123'.

tools.name: list_bitlinks
tools.description: Retrieve a list of Bitlinks for a specific group. Returns Bitlinks sorted by creation date. Supports pagination and filtering.

group_guid.description: The GUID of the group whose Bitlinks to list. Find your group GUID via the Bitly dashboard or by calling the groups endpoint.

size.description: Number of results per page. Default is 50.

page.description: Page number for pagination. Default is 1.

keyword.description: Filter Bitlinks by keyword in the long URL or title. Optional.

tools.name: get_clicks_summary
tools.description: Get a summary of clicks for a specific Bitlink. Returns total click count for the specified time period. Useful for analytics and reporting.

bitlink.description: The Bitlink to get clicks for, without protocol. Example: 'bit.ly/abc123'.

unit.description: Time unit for the click data. Defaults to 'day'.

units.description: Number of time units to query. Use -1 to return all available data. Defaults to -1.

unit_reference.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for the most recent time to pull metrics. Defaults to current time. Optional.

tools.name: update_bitlink
tools.description: Update properties of an existing Bitlink such as its title, tags, or archived status. Note: the destination URL (long_url) cannot be changed after creation.

bitlink.description: The Bitlink to update, without protocol. Example: 'bit.ly/abc123'.

tags.description: Array of tags to associate with the Bitlink.
